full_text: Sarvottam Paints Industries Limited is going to issue its 85,000.00 units of IPO shares to the Nepalese citizens working abroad starting from 21st - 24th Baishakh, 2083

Mount Everest Power Development Limited is going to issue its 8,60,000.00 units of IPO shares to the project affected local residents of Solukhumbu District, Solu Dudhkunda Municipality Ward No. 01 & 02 and other Wards of affected areas starting from 17th - 31st Baishakh, 2083
Mount Everest Power Development Limited is going to issue its 1,72,000.00 units of IPO shares to the Nepalese citizens working abroad starting from 17th - 23rd Baishakh, 2083
Yambaling Hydropower Limited is going to issue its 17,43,000.00 units of IPO shares to the general public starting from 16th - 22nd Baishakh, 2083
Everest Colour Limited is going to issue its 79,000.00 units of IPO shares to the Nepalese citizens working abroad starting from 16th - 22nd Baishakh, 2083
Sopan Pharmaceuticals Limited has published a notice regarding the opening and closing dates for its upcoming IPO of 34,74,900.00 units of shares to the general public from 3rd to 8th Baishakh, 2083
